criteria_scores.name: Respect du Pipeline
criteria_scores.observations: Agent skipped the entire code generation phase; no .tf files were produced despite claiming completion, indicating pipeline execution failed at the critical code generation step.

criteria_scores.name: Qualité du Code Terraform
criteria_scores.observations: No Terraform files exist to evaluate; the promised file structure (providers.tf, variables.tf, main.tf, outputs.tf) was never generated.

criteria_scores.name: Validation Terraform
criteria_scores.observations: Terraform validate failed with 'No .tf files found'; the agent did not produce any code to validate, making this a complete failure.

criteria_scores.name: Revue de Code
criteria_scores.observations: No code review was performed because no code was generated; the review_and_fix_code step could not execute.

criteria_scores.name: Documentation
criteria_scores.observations: Agent provided extensive markdown documentation and usage guides, but these are worthless without actual Terraform code to document.

strengths: Clear articulation of security best practices (public access prevention, encryption, retention, versioning, IAM controls)
Well-structured documentation outline with usage guide and examples
improvements: Agent must actually generate .tf files instead of describing them; the entire deliverable is missing
Agent should have detected the missing code generation step and either completed it or reported failure before presenting as 'Complete'
No terraform validate or code review was performed; these critical pipeline steps were skipped
summary: Agent failed to deliver any working Terraform code despite claiming completion; it produced only documentation describing what should have been built, resulting in a non-functional deliverable that fails validation.
